title: Accusé de réception kenyan de l'instrument français daté du 17 novembre

pages.text:
•

Telegraphic Address: "FOREIGN'

HARAMBEE HOUSe

HARAMBEE AVENUE

Telephone: 27411

When replying please quote

Rer. No. MFA. 171/09A/51 and date

MINISTRY OF FOrEIGN AFFAIRS

P.O. Box 30551

NAIROBI

KENYA

19....

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic

of Kenya presents its compliments to the French Embassy and has the honour to acknowledge the receipt of the latter's note Ref. 148/11.12 of 8th December, 1971 enclosing a note from His Excellency MI. Maurice Schumann,

Minister for Foreign Affairs of the French Republic confirming that the relevant constitutional requirements of the French Republic for the coming into force of the agreement on Cultural and Technical relation of the exchange of letters annexed to it have been complied

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic

of Kenya avails itself of this opportunity to renew to the French Embassy the assurance of its highest consideration.

ARRIVEE

29 DEC 1971

24th December, 1971

NAIROBI

The French Embassy,

NAIROBI

MAIROBI

AFFAIRE

Service Culturel

ARRIVEE

Date: 3-1-72

No: 04
